key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh status display from D-Bus (in seconds)

key.name: command-threshold
key.description: Minimum confidence percentage required to execute voice commands

key.name: command-endpoint-silence
key.description: Maps to streaming ASR trailing-silence (rule2). Lower is snappier utterance close.

key.name: workflow-session-timeout
key.description: How long multi-turn slot workflows wait before clearing (seconds).

key.name: hotword
key.description: The word used to activate command mode from normal mode

key.name: gpu-acceleration
key.description: Prefer CUDA when Willow was built with GPU sherpa-onnx (auto via deploy-dev.sh / makepkg). Falls back to CPU automatically.

key.name: typing-auto-revert
key.description: When enabled, typing mode returns to normal after the command-mode idle timeout. Off by default — stay in typing until an exit phrase or manual switch.

key.name: early-fire
key.description: Execute exact phrase matches as soon as streaming ASR hypotheses match, without waiting for endpoint silence.

key.name: llm-enabled
key.description: When enabled and a GGUF model path is set, rewrite ambiguous utterances to structured intents after endpoint. Off by default.

key.name: llm-model-path
key.description: Path to a local GGUF model used by llama-cli for intent fallback.

key.name: llm-max-tokens
key.description: Maximum tokens generated by the local LLM fallback.

key.name: llm-timeout-ms
key.description: Hard timeout in milliseconds for the local LLM fallback.
